Calculates the full cattle population structure (Internal Helper)

Source: R/population_cattle.R
calculate_population_cattle.Rd

Calculates the full cattle population structure (Internal Helper)

Usage

calculate_population_cattle(census_cattle, rate_parameters, categories)

Arguments

census_cattle

Edit in csv

rate_parameters

Edit in csv

categories
